subject: Code Smell Scan —72 Issues Across 30+ Files
body:
## Code Smell Scan

Three parallel scans covered ~30 source files across `SquadDash/`, `Squad.SDK/`, and `VoiceHeuristics/`. **72 distinct smells** were identified across11 categories. No code was modified — this is a report-only scan.

---

## Findings by Category

###🔴 Magic Numbers / Magic Strings (18 occurrences) — Highest frequency

| File | Anchor | Issue |
|------|--------|-------|
| `SquadDash/NativeMethods.cs` | `DisableRoundedCorners()` | Hard-coded DWM attribute values `1` and `33` — should be `DWMWA_WINDOW_CORNER_PREFERENCE = 33`, `DWMWCP_DONOTROUND = 1` |
| `SquadDash/NativeMethods.cs` | `IsHeightConstrained()` | Magic threshold `0.90` — extract to `const double WindowHeightConstraintThreshold = 0.90` |
| `SquadDash/MarkdownFlowDocumentBuilder.cs` | `BuildHeading()` | Font sizes `24d, 20d, 17d, 15d` — should be a `Dictionary<int, double> HeadingSizes` |
| `SquadDash/MarkdownFlowDocumentBuilder.cs` | `BuildTable()` | Hard-coded padding values `26px, 12px, 10px` with no context |
| `SquadDash/MarkdownHtmlBuilder.cs` | `Build()` | Hard-coded hex color palette (`#1e1c17`, `#fffcf8`, etc.) repeated throughout — should be class-level constants |
| `SquadDash/ColorUtilities.cs` | `HueToRgb()` | Magic fractions `1.0/6`, `1.0/2`, `2.0/3` — add constants: `Sixth`, `Half`, `TwoThirds` |
| `SquadDash/ApplicationSettingsStore.cs` | Constructor | Hard-coded mutex name `@"Local\SquadDash.ApplicationSettings"` — extract to `const string SettingsMutexName` |
| `SquadDash/TasksJsonParser.cs` | Class-level fields | Regex patterns `@"^[A-Z]+-\d{8}$"` and `@"^([A-Z]+-\d{8})-\d{3}$"` unexplained — add XML doc comments describing the format |
| `SquadDash/BackgroundWorkClassifier.cs` | `IsPlanningWork()` | Long chain of hard-coded keyword strings — extract to a `static readonly HashSet<string> PlanningKeywords` |
| `SquadDash/WorkspaceOpenCoordinator.cs` | Class fields | `TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(400)` and `TimeSpan.FromSeconds(2)` — add comments explaining the retry rationale |
| `SquadDash/WorkspaceOpenCoordinator.cs` | `TryActivateExistingOwner()` | `Thread.Sleep(50)` — extract as `const int PollIntervalMs = 50` |
| `SquadDash/ToolTranscriptFormatter.cs` | `GetToolEmoji()` | Emoji characters in switch expression — use a `Dictionary<string, string>` mapping |
| `SquadDash/SpeechRecognitionService.cs` | `OnAudioData()` | Magic values `16000` (sample rate), `/ 2` (bytes/sample), `/ 6000.0` (RMS factor) — extract to named constants |
| `SquadDash/WhisperSpeechRecognitionService.cs` | Class constants | `ChunkSeconds = 5`, `SampleRate = 16000`, `BufferMilliseconds = 80` lack explanatory XML doc comments |
| `SquadDash/PushToTalkWindow.cs` | `PositionUnderCaret()` | Offsets `6`, `4`, `-4`, `estimatedWidth=80`, `estimatedHeight=110` with no explanation |
| `SquadDash/ScreenshotOverlayWindow.cs` | Class constants | `HandleSize=9`, `HitPad=5`, `MinSize=80`, `ToolbarMargin=8`, `ToolbarThreshold=52` — add inline comments |
| `SquadDash/InboxMessageWindow.cs` | `BuildAttachmentChip()` | Values `0.9`, `32`, `56`, `800`, `600` — define as named constants |
| `SquadDash/VoiceHeuristics/VoiceInsertionHeuristics.cs` | `StripFillerWords()` | `\u2013`, `\u2014` in regex — add `const string EnDash`, `const string EmDash` |

---

### 🔴 Long Methods / Long Constructors (12 occurrences)

| File | Anchor | Size | Issue |
|------|--------|------|-------|
| `SquadDash/InboxMessageWindow.cs` | `BuildAttachmentChip()` | ~148 lines | Nested switch for 5+ attachment types — extract each case into `HandleXxxAttachment()` |
| `SquadDash/MarkdownFlowDocumentBuilder.cs` | `Build()` | ~115 lines | Monolithic markdown-to-FlowDocument conversion — extract `TryParseMarkdownElement()` strategies |
| `SquadDash/MarkdownHtmlBuilder.cs` | `Build()` | ~100 lines | HTML generation with repeated resource lookups — decompose into section builders |
| `SquadDash/MaintenanceRunner.cs` | `StartAsync()` | ~130 lines | Task orchestration, state tracking, nested try-catch — extract `ProcessTask()`, `HandleTaskError()` |
| `SquadDash/AgentInfoWindow.cs` | `ExtractBioFromMd()` | ~72 lines | Triple-nested loops for markdown parsing — extract `FindAgentSection()`, `ExtractSpecialties()` |
| `SquadDash/LoopPickerDialog.cs` | Constructor | ~180 lines | Entire UI built inline — extract `CreateTitleBar()`, `CreateBodyPanel()`, `CreateButtonRow()` |
| `SquadDash/PushToTalkWindow.cs` | Constructor | ~134 lines | Inline SVG geometry paths for mic icon — extract to method or XAML resource |
| `SquadDash/WhisperSpeechRecognitionService.cs` | `FlushBufferAsync()` | ~55 lines | Buffer management + HTTP + JSON parsing — extract `SubmitAudioChunkAsync()`, `ParseWhisperResponse()` |
| `SquadDash/TasksPanelController.cs` | `Refresh()` | ~47 lines | Data transformation mixed with UI construction — extract `BuildTasksPanel()` |
| `SquadDash/TasksPanelController.cs` | `BuildRow()` / `BuildDoneRow()` | ~80 lines each | Nearly identical methods (differ only in checkbox vs. dot) — extract shared `BuildTaskRowCommon()` |
| `SquadDash/VoiceHeuristics/VoiceInsertionHeuristics.cs` | `Apply()` | ~67 lines | Complex heuristic branching — decompose into per-heuristic methods |
| `SquadDash/PreferencesWindow.cs` | Constructor | Estimated500+ lines | 55+ fields initialized inline — split initialization by subsystem |

---

### 🔴 Silent Exception Suppression (6 occurrences)

| File | Anchor | Issue |
|------|--------|-------|
| `SquadDash/AzureTtsProvider.cs` | `SpeakAsync()` | Catches all exceptions, only writes to Debug — use specific catch types, log to app log |
| `SquadDash/OpenAiTtsProvider.cs` | `SpeakAsync()` | Same pattern — silent catch-all |
| `SquadDash/RevisionResultWindow.cs` | Constructor | `catch { }` on clipboard set — user never informed; at minimum add Debug logging |
| `SquadDash/CommitApprovalWindow.cs` | Various | Multiple empty `catch { }` blocks |
| `SquadDash/HireAgentWindow.cs` | Various | Multiple empty `catch { }` blocks |
| `SquadDash/LoopController.cs` | `RunLoopAsync()` | `catch { /* swallow post-abort exception */ }` — document exactly which exceptions are expected, or catch only `OperationCanceledException` |

---

### 🟠 God Classes / Mixed Concerns (6 occurrences)

| File | Issue | Suggested Split|
|------|-------|-----------------|
| `SquadDash/AgentStatusCard.cs` | ~380 lines mixing `INotifyPropertyChanged`, static theme management, weak-reference collection, status logic | `AgentStatusCardViewModel`, `AgentThemeManager`, `AgentStatusValidator`|
| `SquadDash/MarkdownDocumentWindow.cs` | 20+ fields mixing UI state, voice state, PTT state, editor state, title state | `EditorVoiceController`, `TitleVoiceController`, `DocumentTabManager` |
| `SquadDash/PreferencesWindow.cs` | 55+ flat field declarations for sounds, notifications, tunnel, BYOK, PTT | Group into nested config objects or partial classes by subsystem |
| `SquadDash/ApplicationSettingsStore.cs` | Handles folder history, agent colors, window placement, font sizes, image paths, routing issues | Split into domain-specific stores|
| `SquadDash/MarkdownFlowDocumentBuilder.cs` | Static class with15+ private methods: tables, lists, code blocks, paragraphs, headings | Introduce a `MarkdownElementParser` base and specializations |
| `SquadDash/TranscriptConversationManager.cs` | Constructor accepts29 delegate parameters | Group into `TranscriptRenderingCallbacks` and `TranscriptLifecycleCallbacks` context objects |

---

### 🟠 Complex Conditionals / State Machines (6 occurrences)

| File | Anchor | Issue |
|------|--------|-------|
| `SquadDash/PushToTalkController.cs` | `HandlePreviewKeyDown()` | 60-line multi-level state machine with 4 states and magic ms values (`250`, `350`) — extract `TransitionFromIdle()`, `TransitionFromTapDown()` etc. |
| `SquadDash/LoopController.cs` | `RunLoopAsync()` | Nested max-iterations check (find option → TryParse → bounds-check → compare) — extract `IsMaxIterationsReached()` |
| `SquadDash/InboxMessageParser.cs` | `TryExtract()` | Nested brace-matching state machine (`inString`, `escaped`, `depth`) — extract `FindMatchingBrace()` |
| `SquadDash/VoiceHeuristics/VoiceInsertionHeuristics.cs` | `IsSentenceContinuation()` | Multi-branch OR checks for comma, paren, semicolon, dashes — extract `IsSentenceContinuationCharacter()` |
| `SquadDash/ApplicationSettingsStore.cs` | `SaveAgentAccentColor()` | Dictionary-existence check +ternary + dictionary recreation nested — extract `EnsureWorkspaceColors()` |
| `SquadDash/NativeMethods.cs` | `CaptureWindowRegion()` | Nested ternary + `Math.Round` chains for coordinate transforms — extract coordinate processing to helper|

---

### 🟠 Inefficient Patterns / Code Duplication (6 occurrences)

| File | Anchor | Issue |
|------|--------|-------|
| `SquadDash/ToolTranscriptFormatter.cs` | Multiple methods | `.Replace("\r\n", "\n").Replace('\r', '\n')` repeated ~20 times across the codebase — extract `NormalizeLineEndings()` utility |
| `SquadDash/LoopController.cs` | `ExpandVariables()` | Sequential `text.Replace()` calls — use a `Dictionary<string, string>` substitution map applied in one pass |
| `SquadDash/TasksPanelController.cs` | `ApplyFilterToPanel()` | Two-pass filter (items first, headings second) iterates panel twice — combine into single pass |
| `SquadDash/ApplicationSettingsStore.cs` | Multiple methods | `ToDictionary(...StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)` pattern repeated 3+ times — extract helper|
| `SquadDash/TextCaseHelper.cs` | `DetectCase()` | `text.Contains('-')` then full iteration — use a single regex|
| `SquadDash/AgentThreadRegistry.cs` | `GetOrCreateAgentThread()` | 6 repetitions of `if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(x)) { thread.X = x.Trim(); }` — extract `TrySetIfNotEmpty()` |

---

### 🟡 Unclear Naming (5 occurrences)

| File | Anchor | Issue |
|------|--------|-------|
| `SquadDash/ColorUtilities.cs` | `RgbToHsl()` / `HslToRgb()` | Single-letter variables `rd`, `gd`, `bd`, `h`, `s`, `l` — use `redNorm`, `hue`, `saturation`, `lightness` |
| `SquadDash/VoiceHeuristics/VoiceInsertionHeuristics.cs` | Static fields | `s_leadingFiller`, `s_midFiller`, `s_trailingFiller` — rename to `FillerAtLineStart`, `FillerMidSentence`, `FillerAtLineEnd` |
| `SquadDash/AgentStatusCard.cs` | `IsStatusNoise()` | Vague method name — rename to `IsIgnorableStatus()`, extract `"Ready"`/`"Active"` as constants |
| `SquadDash/LoopController.cs` | `RunLoopAsync()` | Variable `timeoutExpired` is actually a `Task`, not a bool — rename to `timeoutTask` |
| `SquadDash/NativeMethods.cs` | PInvoke structs | `RECT`, `POINT`, `MONITORINFO` in ALL_CAPS is conventional for P/Invoke but deserves a comment |

---

### 🟡 Missing Null Checks (4 occurrences)

| File | Anchor | Issue |
|------|--------|-------|
| `SquadDash/ColorUtilities.cs` | `CreateDarkAccentBrush()` | No null check on `ColorConverter.ConvertFromString()` result before cast|
| `SquadDash/MarkdownFlowDocumentBuilder.cs` | `Build()` | `Application.Current?.Resources["FontSizeMedium"]` used without consistent `?? fallback` |
| `SquadDash/ToolTranscriptFormatter.cs` | `ResolveContext()` / `BuildStatusText()` | String params used in substring ops without null/empty guard clauses |
| `SquadDash/SquadCliAdapter.cs` | `TryResolveSquadVersion()` | `process.StandardOutput.ReadToEnd()` called without guarding against null stream |

---

### 🟡 Large Parameter Lists / Constructor Bloat (4 occurrences)

| File | Anchor | Issue |
|------|--------|-------|
| `SquadDash/TranscriptConversationManager.cs` | Constructor | 29 parameters (all delegates) — introduce callback context objects |
| `SquadDash/AgentThreadRegistry.cs` | Constructor | 18 `Action`/`Func` parameters — same pattern |
| `SquadDash/PushToTalkController.cs` | Constructor | 9 parameters — extract to `PushToTalkConfig` |
| `SquadDash/PreferencesWindow.cs` | Constructor | 6 params with optional `startPtt`/`stopPtt` — wrap in `PreferencesWindowConfig` |

---

### 🟡 Dead Code / Unused Members (3 occurrences)

| File | Anchor | Issue |
|------|--------|-------|
| `SquadDash/ColorUtilities.cs` | `AccentBrush()` | Wrapper around `CreateAccentBrush()` with identical implementation — appears unused |
| `SquadDash/LoopController.cs` | `RunLoopAsync()` catch block | Swallows all post-abort exceptions with no documentation of expected types |
| `SquadDash/MaintenanceRunner.cs` | Class body | Very large instruction string constants (`ReportOnlyInboxPreamble`, `MaintenanceInboxReminder`) embedded inline — should live in a dedicated resource/constants file |

---

### 🟡 Resource Leaks / Thread Safety (2 occurrences)

| File | Anchor | Issue |
|------|--------|-------|
| `SquadDash/OpenAiTtsProvider.cs` | `SpeakAsync()` | Temp MP3 file created but never deleted; `MediaPlayer` reference not stored for disposal — hook `MediaEnded` to delete temp file |
| `SquadDash/AgentStatusCard.cs` | `ImagesVisible` static collection | `WeakReference` collection accessed outside lock in some paths — use `ConcurrentBag` or ensure all accesses are within the lock |

---

## Smell Distribution

| Category | Count |
|----------|-------|
| Magic Numbers / Magic Strings | 18 |
| Long Methods / Long Constructors | 12 |
| Silent Exception Suppression | 6 |
| God Classes / Mixed Concerns | 6 |
| Complex Conditionals / State Machines | 6 |
| Inefficient Patterns / Code Duplication | 6 |
| Unclear Naming | 5 |
| Missing Null Checks | 4 |
| Large Parameter Lists / Constructor Bloat | 4 |
| Dead Code / Unused Members | 3 |
| Resource Leaks / Thread Safety | 2 |
| **Total** | **72** |

---

## Top 5 Highest-Impact Fixes

1. **Extract `NormalizeLineEndings()` utility** — eliminates ~20 duplicate `.Replace()` chains scattered throughout `ToolTranscriptFormatter.cs` and related files.
2. **Replace all empty `catch { }` blocks** — 6 files silently swallow exceptions; at minimum add `Debug.WriteLine` logging.
3. **Extract magic numbers to named constants** — 18 instances; highest ROI for future maintainers is `NativeMethods.cs`, `MarkdownFlowDocumentBuilder.cs`, and `PushToTalkController.cs`.
4. **Decompose god classes** — `AgentStatusCard`, `PreferencesWindow`, `ApplicationSettingsStore`, and `TranscriptConversationManager` all violate single responsibility.
5. **Fix `OpenAiTtsProvider` resource leak** — temp MP3 file and `MediaPlayer` instance are never cleaned up after TTS playback.

actions.label: Fix silent exception suppression
actions.prompt:
During a code smell scan ofSquadDash-public, 6 instances of silent exception suppression were found. Please fix them by replacing empty or catch-all `catch { }` / `catch (Exception) { }` blocks with at minimum `Debug.WriteLine` logging, or preferably catching specific exception types. Files affected:

1. `SquadDash/AzureTtsProvider.cs` — `SpeakAsync()` method catches all exceptions and only writes to Debug. Replace with `catch (HttpRequestException ex)` or similar specific type.
2. `SquadDash/OpenAiTtsProvider.cs` — `SpeakAsync()` same pattern. Also: this method creates a temp MP3 file and a `MediaPlayer` instance but never cleans them up. Hook into the `MediaEnded` event to call `File.Delete(tempPath)` and dispose the player.
3. `SquadDash/RevisionResultWindow.cs` — Constructor has `try { Clipboard.SetText(revisedText); } catch { }` — add `catch (Exception ex) { Debug.WriteLine($"Clipboard error: {ex.Message}"); }`.
4. `SquadDash/CommitApprovalWindow.cs` — Multiple empty `catch { }` blocks — add Debug logging.
5. `SquadDash/HireAgentWindow.cs` — Multiple empty `catch { }` blocks — add Debug logging.
6. `SquadDash/LoopController.cs` — `RunLoopAsync()` has `catch { /* swallow post-abort exception */ }` — narrow to `catch (OperationCanceledException)` if that is what's expected, and add a comment.

Do not change any other logic — only the exception handling. Run the build after to confirm no regressions.
actions.hint: Fix6 silent catch blocks across AzureTtsProvider, OpenAiTtsProvider, RevisionResultWindow, CommitApprovalWindow, HireAgentWindow, LoopController

actions.label: Extract NormalizeLineEndings utility
actions.prompt:
During a code smell scan of SquadDash-public, approximately 20 repetitions of the pattern `.Replace("\r\n", "\n").Replace('\r', '\n')` were found scattered throughout `SquadDash/ToolTranscriptFormatter.cs` and related files.

Please:
1. Create a `NormalizeLineEndings(string text)` static helper method in an appropriate shared utility class (e.g., `TranscriptTextUtilities.cs` or a new `StringExtensions.cs` in `SquadDash/`).
2. Replace all occurrences of `.Replace("\r\n", "\n").Replace('\r', '\n')` across the codebase with a call to this utility.
3. Run the build and tests after to confirm no regressions.

Start by searching for all occurrences of this pattern with grep, then make the replacements.
actions.hint: ~20 duplicate line-ending normalizations — extract to one shared utility method

actions.label: Extract magic numbers to constants
actions.prompt:
During a code smell scan of SquadDash-public, 18 magic number/string occurrences were found. Please address the highest-priority ones:

1. `SquadDash/NativeMethods.cs` — `DisableRoundedCorners()`: values `1` and `33` should be `private const int DWMWA_WINDOW_CORNER_PREFERENCE = 33` and `private const int DWMWCP_DONOTROUND = 1`. Also `IsHeightConstrained()`: `0.90` → `private const double WindowHeightConstraintThreshold = 0.90`.
2. `SquadDash/MarkdownFlowDocumentBuilder.cs` — `BuildHeading()`: font sizes `24d, 20d, 17d, 15d` → `private static readonly Dictionary<int, double> HeadingSizes = new() { [1]=24d, [2]=20d, [3]=17d, [4]=15d }`.
3. `SquadDash/PushToTalkController.cs` — `HandlePreviewKeyDown()`: magic ms values `250` and `350` → `private const int PttMaxTapHoldMs = 250` and `private const int PttDoubleClickMs = 350`.
4. `SquadDash/WorkspaceOpenCoordinator.cs` — `Thread.Sleep(50)` → `private const int PollIntervalMs = 50`. Add a comment on the two TimeSpan constants explaining the retry rationale.
5. `SquadDash/ApplicationSettingsStore.cs` — Constructor: mutex name string → `private const string SettingsMutexName = @"Local\SquadDash.ApplicationSettings"`.
6. `SquadDash/BackgroundWorkClassifier.cs` — `IsPlanningWork()`: inline keyword strings → `private static readonly HashSet<string> PlanningKeywords`.

Make targeted surgical changes. Run the build after to confirm no regressions.
actions.hint: Address top-priority magic numbers across NativeMethods, MarkdownFlowDocumentBuilder, PushToTalkController, WorkspaceOpenCoordinator, ApplicationSettingsStore, BackgroundWorkClassifier

actions.label: Dismiss
actions.hint: Acknowledge report — no action will be taken
